---
title: "The Rev. Dr. William Wallace"
---

## The Rev. Dr. William Wallace

**Dates:** (b.Ireland 1828/9)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1869-79)

### Biography

His contributions are all about the mission work of St. Luke’s, Burdett Road, Stepney; <i>The Times</i> (20 November 1915) records the dedication on 24 November of a chapel 'which has been added to St. Luke's Church, Burdett-road, Stepney as a memorial to the late Rev. Dr. William Wallace, who was vicar there for 44 years.’

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
